title: Option to include "my Teams" in Dynamic people filter

posts.author: tsentis (Thomas Sentis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday team,

We’re using heavily the teams feature to ease the load on our admins, so they don’t have to update constantly the automations when people join or leave.

Therefore, it would be very helpful to have the option to create a dynamic filter on the people column that includes the teams users are part of. In particular for saved views of a board, so we can reduce the number of saved views and make more user-friendly and accurate.

Thanks for your consideration,
Thomas

posts.author: edwardo (Eddie Olmos)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m in the same scenario. While we can use My Work and see those items we are assigned to in a Team, it would be much more helpful to see a dynamic filter for this.
